title: “These numbers were so botted”: xQc makes shocking claim about Overwatch League viewership
summary_full: Former Overwatch League pro xQc alleges the league's reported high viewership numbers were heavily inflated by bots.  He claims an insider revealed the true, much lower audience figures during early testing, prompting his decision to leave professional esports.  Strict streaming rules also hindered his content creation, pushing him to prioritize his personal brand.
